\section{Intro}
As shown in \cite{he2016deep}, deep learning is powerful.
\citet{krizhevsky2012imagenet} proved CNNs work.
Multi-head attention \citep{vaswani2017attention} is key.
\citeauthor{vaswani2017attention} also contributed to NLP.
